```{shinylive-r}
      y_name = "Commits")
  })

  output$rh_timing <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_timing)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- git_timing
    day_names <- c("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun")
    if (!"day_name" %in% names(d)) d$day_name <- day_names[d$weekday]
    heat_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(as.integer(d$hour[i]), match(d$day_name[i], day_names) - 1,
           as.integer(d$commits[i])))
    max_c <- max(d$commits, na.rm = TRUE)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(0:23), name = "Hour"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(day_names)),
      visualMap = list(min = 0, max = max(max_c, 1), calculable = TRUE,
        inRange = list(color = I(c("#1a1a1a", pal$accent, pal$claude))),
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      series = list(list(type = "heatmap", data = heat_data,
        label = list(show = FALSE)))
    ), aria_label = "Commit timing heatmap: when commits happen by hour and day")
  })

  output$rh_file_growth <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_file_growth)) return(ec_empty("No file growth data available"))
    d <- git_file_growth
    # Parse date
    d$date <- as.Date(d$date)
    # These are 6-month rolling aggregates, show all snapshots
    # Aggregate by date (sum across projects if multiple)
    agg <- aggregate(cbind(files_added, files_deleted) ~ date, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg <- agg[order(agg$date), ]

    if (nrow(agg) == 0) return(ec_empty("No data available"))

    # Create line chart with two series
    series <- list(
      list(name = "Added (6mo)", type = "line", data = I(agg$files_added),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$accent),
           areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.3)),
      list(name = "Deleted (6mo)", type = "line", data = I(agg$files_deleted),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini),
           areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.3))
    )
    ec_line(agg$date, series, y_name = "Files (6-month rolling)",
            aria_label = "6-month rolling file growth: added vs deleted")
  })

  output$rh_churn <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_churn)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- head(git_churn[order(git_churn$changes, decreasing = TRUE), ], 15)
    d <- d[nrow(d):1, ]  # reverse for horizontal dotchart
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0)),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 150),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Changes"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(basename(d$file))),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(d$changes),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$orange),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc",
                     distance = 6)))
    ), aria_label = "Churn hotspots: most-modified files in last 6 months")
  })

  output$rh_bugs <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_bugs)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- head(git_bugs[order(git_bugs$fixes, decreasing = TRUE), ], 15)
    d <- d[nrow(d):1, ]
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0)),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 150),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Fixes"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(basename(d$file))),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(d$fixes),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc",
                     distance = 6)))
    ), aria_label = "Bug fixes by file: files with most fix commits")
  })

  output$rh_todo <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(git_todo)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    datatable(git_todo, options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$rh_crisis <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(git_crisis)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    datatable(git_crisis, options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$gh_events_chart <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(gh_events)) {
      return(ec_empty("No GitHub events data available"))
    }

    # Parse dates and aggregate by date and event type using base R
    gh_events$date <- as.Date(substr(gh_events$created_at, 1, 10))

    # Count events by date and type using aggregate
    event_summary <- aggregate(
      created_at ~ date + event_type,
      data = gh_events,
      FUN = length
    )
    names(event_summary)[3] <- "n"

    if (nrow(event_summary) == 0) {
      return(ec_empty("No events in selected period"))
    }

    # Get unique dates and event types
    all_dates <- sort(unique(event_summary$date))
    event_types <- unique(event_summary$event_type)

    # Create series for each event type
    series <- lapply(event_types, function(et) {
      counts <- sapply(all_dates, function(d) {
        idx <- event_summary$date == d & event_summary$event_type == et
        if (any(idx)) event_summary$n[idx][1] else 0
      })
      list(
        name = et,
        type = "bar",
        stack = "events",
        data = I(counts)
      )
    })

    ec_bar(all_dates, series, h = "350px", y_name = "Events",
      aria_label = "GitHub issue events by type over time")
  })

  # --- Calibration ------------------------------------------------------------
  output$cal_reliability <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty())
    # Recompute reliability buckets from preds_raw filtered by cutoff (#82)
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome) & !is.na(preds_raw$p_success), ]
    if (!is.null(cutoff()) && "recorded_at" %in% names(d)) {
      rat <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(d$recorded_at)), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(rat)) d <- d[!is.na(rat) & rat >= cutoff(), ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No predictions in this period"))
    d$outcome_num <- ifelse(d$outcome == TRUE | d$outcome == "true", 1,
                    ifelse(d$outcome == "partial", 0.5, 0))
    d$bucket_cut <- cut(d$p_success, breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2), include.lowest = TRUE)
    agg_p <- aggregate(p_success  ~ bucket_cut, data = d, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg_a <- aggregate(outcome_num ~ bucket_cut, data = d, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg_n <- aggregate(outcome_num ~ bucket_cut, data = d, FUN = length)
    d <- merge(merge(agg_p, agg_a, by = "bucket_cut"), agg_n, by = "bucket_cut")
    names(d) <- c("bucket_cut", "mean_predicted", "actual_accuracy", "n")
    # Scatter: predicted (x) vs actual (y) + diagonal reference line
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(d$mean_predicted[i], d$actual_accuracy[i], d$n[i]))
    id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
    opt <- list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "inside", yAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "slider", xAxisIndex = 0, bottom = 5),
        list(type = "slider", yAxisIndex = 0, right = 5)
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 50, right = 50),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Predicted", min = 0, max = 1),
      yAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Actual", min = 0, max = 1),
      series = list(
        list(type = "line", data = list(list(0, 0), list(1, 1)),
             lineStyle = list(type = "dashed", color = "#666"),
             symbol = "none", name = "Perfect"),
        list(type = "scatter", data = pts, name = "Buckets",
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude))
      )
    )
    j <- toJSON(opt, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
    tagList(
      tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", style = "width:100%;height:340px"),
      tags$script(HTML(paste0(
        "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
        "var o=", j, ";",
        "o.series[1].symbolSize=function(d){return Math.max(8,Math.sqrt(d[2])*6)};",
        "o.series[1].label={show:true,formatter:function(p){return p.value[2]+' preds'},color:'#ccc',fontSize:10};",
        "c.setOption(o);new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
        ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'))})();"
      )))
    )
  })

  output$cal_brier <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw) || !"brier" %in% names(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome_recorded_at) & !is.na(preds_raw$brier), ]
    if (!is.null(cutoff())) {
      orat <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(d$outcome_recorded_at)), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(orat)) d <- d[!is.na(orat) & orat >= cutoff(), ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No resolved predictions in this period"))
    d$orat_date <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(d$outcome_recorded_at)), error = function(e) as.Date(NA))
    gran <- if (!is.null(input$granularity)) input$granularity else "daily"
    if (gran == "monthly") {
      d$period <- format(d$orat_date, "%Y-%m")
    } else if (gran == "weekly") {
      d$period <- format(d$orat_date, "%Y-W%V")
    } else {
      d$period <- as.character(d$orat_date)
    }
    agg <- aggregate(brier ~ period, data = d, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg <- agg[order(agg$period), ]
    ec_line(agg$period, list(
      list(name = "Mean Brier", type = "line", data = I(round(agg$brier, 4)),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude),
           markLine = list(data = list(list(yAxis = 0.25, name = "Uninformative")),
             lineStyle = list(color = "#666", type = "dashed")))
    ), default_window_days = 0)
  })

  output$cal_by_type <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw) || !"task_type" %in% names(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome), ]
    if (!is.null(cutoff()) && "outcome_recorded_at" %in% names(d)) {
      orat <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(d$outcome_recorded_at)), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(orat)) d <- d[!is.na(orat) & orat >= cutoff(), ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No resolved predictions in this period"))
    d$outcome_num <- ifelse(d$outcome == TRUE | d$outcome == "true", 1,
                     ifelse(d$outcome == "partial", 0.5, 0))
    agg <- aggregate(cbind(accuracy = outcome_num, n = outcome_num) ~ task_type,
      data = d, FUN = function(x) c(mean(x), length(x)))
    if (is.matrix(agg$accuracy)) {
      types <- agg$task_type
      acc <- round(agg$accuracy[, 1], 2)
      counts <- as.integer(agg$n[, 2])
    } else {
      types <- agg$task_type
      acc <- round(agg$accuracy, 2)
      counts <- as.integer(agg$n)
    }
    labels <- paste0(types, " (n=", counts, ")")
    h_px <- max(280, length(labels) * 45)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "inside", yAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "slider", yAxisIndex = 0, right = 5)
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 150, right = 60, top = 20, bottom = 20),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Accuracy", min = 0, max = 1),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(labels)),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(acc),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$accent),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc")))
    ), h = paste0(h_px, "px"))
  })

  output$cal_by_project <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw) || !"project_name" %in% names(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty("No project data"))
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome), ]
    if (!is.null(cutoff()) && "outcome_recorded_at" %in% names(d)) {
      orat <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(d$outcome_recorded_at)), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(orat)) d <- d[!is.na(orat) & orat >= cutoff(), ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No resolved predictions in this period"))

    # Convert outcome to numeric
    d$outcome_num <- ifelse(d$outcome == TRUE | d$outcome == "true", 1,
                            ifelse(d$outcome == "partial", 0.5, 0))

    # Aggregate by project
    agg <- aggregate(cbind(accuracy = outcome_num, n = outcome_num) ~ project_name,
                     data = d, FUN = function(x) c(mean(x), length(x)))
    # Flatten the matrix columns
    agg_df <- data.frame(
      project = agg$project_name,
      accuracy = agg$accuracy[,1],
      n = agg$n[,2]
    )
    agg_df <- agg_df[order(agg_df$accuracy, decreasing = TRUE), ]

    # Cleveland dot plot
    acc_vals <- round(agg_df$accuracy * 100, 1)
    proj_labels <- agg_df$project
    h_px <- max(280, nrow(agg_df) * 45)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis",
        formatter = "function(p){return p[0].name+': '+p[0].value+'%'}"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "inside", yAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "slider", yAxisIndex = 0, right = 5)
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 150, right = 60, top = 20, bottom = 20),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", min = 0, max = 100, name = "Accuracy %"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(rev(proj_labels))),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter", data = I(rev(acc_vals)),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle = list(color = "#4daf4a"),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc",
                     formatter = "function(p){return p.value+'%'}")
      ))
    ), h = paste0(h_px, "px"), aria_label = "Accuracy by project dotchart")
  })

  output$cal_log <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    d <- preds_raw
    cols <- intersect(c("prediction_id", "project_name", "task_type",
      "task_description", "p_success", "outcome", "outcome_notes"), names(d))
    d <- d[, cols, drop = FALSE]
    datatable(d, options = list(dom = "ftip", pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  # --- Cross-tool daily cost (Cost Trends sub-tab) ----------------------------
  # Panel 2 of #146: stacked/grouped daily cost by Claude, Codex, Gemini.
  # Reads from the already-loaded cc_daily, codex_daily, gem_daily data frames.
  # Degrades gracefully: any absent source is simply omitted from the chart.
  output$cross_tool_daily_cost <- renderUI({
    has_cc  <- has_rows(cc_d()) && "totalCost" %in% names(cc_d())
    has_cx  <- has_rows(codex_d()) && "est_cost_usd" %in% names(codex_d())
    has_gem <- has_rows(gem_d()) && "total_cost" %in% names(gem_d())
    if (!has_cc && !has_cx && !has_gem)
      return(ec_empty("No cross-tool cost data available", h = "300px"))

    rows <- list()
    if (has_cc) {
      a <- aggregate(totalCost ~ date, data = cc_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(a)[2] <- "cost"
      a$source <- "Claude"
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- a
    }
    if (has_cx) {
      a <- aggregate(est_cost_usd ~ date, data = codex_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(a)[2] <- "cost"
      a$source <- "Codex"
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- a
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      a <- aggregate(total_cost ~ date, data = gem_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(a)[2] <- "cost"
      a$source <- "Gemini"
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- a
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(ec_empty("No cross-tool cost data available", h = "300px"))

    d <- do.call(rbind, rows)
    all_dates <- sort(unique(d$date))
    src_color <- c(Claude = SOURCE_PALETTE[["claude"]],
                   Codex  = SOURCE_PALETTE[["codex"]],
                   Gemini = SOURCE_PALETTE[["gemini"]])
    sources <- unique(d$source)
    series <- lapply(sources, function(s) {
      sd <- d[d$source == s, ]
      vals <- rep(0, length(all_dates))
      vals[match(sd$date, all_dates)] <- round(sd$cost, 4)
      list(name = s, type = "line",
           data = I(vals),
           areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.15),
           itemStyle = list(color = unname(src_color[s])),
           lineStyle  = list(color = unname(src_color[s])))
    })
    ec_line(all_dates, series, h = "300px", y_name = "Cost (USD)",
            aria_label = "Grouped line chart: daily API cost by tool (Claude, Codex, Gemini)")
  })

  # --- Reviews tab: roborev pipeline health -----------------------------------
  # Data loaded from roborev_summary.json (pre-computed by export_dashboard_data.R).
  # Falls back gracefully when the file is not available (no roborev data yet).
  roborev_summary_raw <- load_json("roborev_summary.json")
  # roborev_by_repo.json â€” per-repo high-severity counts for Panel 1 of #146.
  # Contract: [{"repo":"llm","n_total":120,"n_high":40,"n_resolved":80,"n_open":40}, ...]
  # Produced by the parallel exclusion PR; degrade gracefully when absent.
  roborev_by_repo_raw <- load_json("roborev_by_repo.json")
  # roborev_resolution.json â€” resolution rate KPI + weekly trend (#146 Q5).
  # Contract: {overall:{total,resolved,open,resolution_rate}, weekly:[{week_start,resolved,open,total,resolution_rate},...]}
  roborev_resolution_raw <- load_json("roborev_resolution.json")
  # roborev_agent_perf.json â€” per-agent pass rate + review counts (#146 Q10).
  # Contract: {agents:[{agent,n_runs,pass_count,fail_count,error_count,pass_rate,...}], generated_at}
  roborev_agent_perf_raw <- load_json("roborev_agent_perf.json")
  # roborev_backlog_age.json â€” open-review age distribution (#146 Q15).
  # Contract: {generated_at, n_open, median_hours, p90_hours, max_hours,
  #   buckets:[{label,hours_min,hours_max,n},...], top_oldest:[{repo,hours_open},...]}
  # Source: ~/.roborev/reviews.db (open reviews Ă— enqueued_at), refreshed locally.
  roborev_backlog_age_raw <- load_json("roborev_backlog_age.json")

  rv_pulse <- if (!is.null(roborev_summary_raw) && is.list(roborev_summary_raw)) {
    roborev_summary_raw$pulse
  } else {
    NULL
  }
  rv_loops_raw <- if (!is.null(roborev_summary_raw) && is.list(roborev_summary_raw)) {
    as_df(roborev_summary_raw$loops)
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  safe_rv <- function(key, default = "â€”") {
    if (is.null(rv_pulse) || !key %in% names(rv_pulse)) return(default)
    v <- rv_pulse[[key]]
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) default else as.character(v)
  }

  output$rv_n_open     <- renderText(safe_rv("n_open"))
  output$rv_n_critical <- renderText(safe_rv("n_critical"))
  output$rv_n_high     <- renderText(safe_rv("n_high"))
  output$rv_n_resolved <- renderText(safe_rv("n_resolved"))
  output$rv_n_loops    <- renderText(safe_rv("n_loops"))
  output$rv_n_escalate <- renderText(safe_rv("n_escalate"))
  output$rv_wasted_usd <- renderText({
    v <- safe_rv("wasted_usd", default = NA)
    if (is.na(v)) return("â€”")
    tryCatch(sprintf("$%.2f", as.numeric(v)), error = function(e) "â€”")
  })

  # Panel 1 of #146: per-repo high-severity findings â€” Cleveland dot chart.
  # Reads roborev_by_repo.json. Degrades to "no data yet" message when absent.
  output$rv_by_repo_chart <- renderUI({
    d <- as_df(roborev_by_repo_raw)
    if (!has_rows(d) || !"repo" %in% names(d))
      return(ec_empty("No per-repo roborev data yet â€” roborev_by_repo.json not deployed", h = "300px"))
    # Use n_high if present, else fall back to n_total
    val_col <- if ("n_high" %in% names(d)) "n_high" else if ("n_total" %in% names(d)) "n_total" else NULL
    if (is.null(val_col))
      return(ec_empty("roborev_by_repo.json missing n_high/n_total columns", h = "300px"))
    # Sort ascending (Cleveland dot: lowest at bottom, highest at top)
    d <- d[order(d[[val_col]], decreasing = FALSE), ]
    axis_label <- if (val_col == "n_high") "High-severity findings" else "Total findings"
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = axis_label,
                   nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 25,
                   axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc"),
                   nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(d$repo),
                   axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11)),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(as.numeric(d[[val_col]])),
        symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = "#f08080")   # danger red from accessibility palette
      ))
    ), h = "300px",
    aria_label = paste0("Cleveland dot chart: ", tolower(axis_label), " per repository, sorted descending"))
  })

  output$rv_loops_table <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(rv_loops_raw)) {
      return(datatable(data.frame(message = "No loop data available"),
                       options = list(dom = "t"), rownames = FALSE))
    }
    d <- rv_loops_raw
    if ("cycles" %in% names(d)) d <- d[order(-as.integer(d$cycles)), ]
    cols <- intersect(
      c("tier", "cycles", "severity", "primary_file", "summary",
        "first_seen", "last_seen", "estimated_wasted_usd"),
      names(d)
    )
    d <- d[, cols, drop = FALSE]
    row_js <- DT::JS("function(row, data) {
      var tier = data[0];
      var palette = {escalate: '#ff5555', block: '#ffaa3d', watch: '#ffd93d'};
      var bg = palette[tier];
      if (bg) $('td', row).css({'background-color': bg, 'color': '#000000'});
    }")
    datatable(d, rownames = FALSE,
      options = list(
        order      = list(list(1, "desc")),
        pageLength = 25,
        dom        = "frtip",
        rowCallback = row_js,
        scrollX    = TRUE
      )
    )
  })

  # --- Resolution Rate panel (#146 Q5) -----------------------------------------
  # KPI text outputs from roborev_resolution.json overall block.
  safe_res <- function(key, fmt = "%s", default = "â€”") {
    if (is.null(roborev_resolution_raw) || !is.list(roborev_resolution_raw)) return(default)
    ov <- roborev_resolution_raw$overall
    if (is.null(ov) || !key %in% names(ov)) return(default)
    v <- ov[[key]]
    if (is.null(v) || (length(v) == 1 && is.na(v))) return(default)
    tryCatch(sprintf(fmt, v), error = function(e) default)
  }

  output$rv_res_rate <- renderText({
    v <- safe_res("resolution_rate")
    if (v == "â€”") return("â€”")
    rate_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(rate_num)) return("â€”")
    sprintf("%.1f%%", rate_num * 100)
  })
  output$rv_res_resolved <- renderText(safe_res("resolved", "%d"))
  output$rv_res_open     <- renderText(safe_res("open",     "%d"))
  output$rv_res_total    <- renderText(safe_res("total",    "%d"))

  output$rv_resolution_trend <- renderUI({
    if (is.null(roborev_resolution_raw) || !is.list(roborev_resolution_raw)) {
      return(ec_empty("roborev_resolution.json not yet available", h = "300px"))
    }
    weekly_raw <- roborev_resolution_raw$weekly
    weekly_empty <- is.null(weekly_raw) ||
      (is.data.frame(weekly_raw) && nrow(weekly_raw) == 0L) ||
      (!is.data.frame(weekly_raw) && length(weekly_raw) == 0L)
    if (weekly_empty) {
      return(ec_empty("No weekly resolution trend data yet", h = "300px"))
    }
    # load_json() uses fromJSON(simplifyDataFrame = TRUE): a JSON array of objects
    # arrives as a data.frame. Accept either a data.frame or a list-of-lists.
    wdf <- if (is.data.frame(weekly_raw)) {
      weekly_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(weekly_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          week_start      = as.character(r$week_start),
          resolved        = as.numeric(r$resolved),
          open            = as.numeric(r$open),
          total           = as.numeric(r$total),
          resolution_rate = as.numeric(r$resolution_rate),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }))
    }
    # Coerce to expected types (data.frame branch may carry integer/character cols).
    wdf$week_start      <- as.character(wdf$week_start)
    wdf$resolved        <- as.numeric(wdf$resolved)
    wdf$open            <- as.numeric(wdf$open)
    wdf <- wdf[order(wdf$week_start), ]

    # Line chart: resolved vs open per week (NOT a bar/stacked bar per viz rules)
    # Range slider defaults to last 3 months (~13 weeks)
    total_weeks <- nrow(wdf)
    dz_start <- if (total_weeks > 13) round(100 * (1 - 13 / total_weeks)) else 0

    ec(list(
      tooltip  = list(trigger = "axis"),
      legend   = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
                      data = list("Resolved", "Open")),
      toolbox  = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
        restore  = list(),
        saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100, filterMode = "filter"),
        list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5, filterMode = "filter")
      ),
      grid     = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
      xAxis    = list(type = "category", data = I(wdf$week_start),
                      axisLabel = list(rotate = 30, color = "#ccc"),
                      name = "Week start (Monday)", nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 45,
                      nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      yAxis    = list(type = "value", name = "Review count",
                      nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
                      axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc")),
      series   = list(
        list(name = "Resolved", type = "line", data = I(wdf$resolved),
             smooth = FALSE, itemStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0"),
             lineStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0", width = 2)),
        list(name = "Open", type = "line", data = I(wdf$open),
             smooth = FALSE, itemStyle = list(color = "#f08080"),
             lineStyle = list(color = "#f08080", width = 2))
      )
    ), h = "300px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Line chart: roborev resolved vs open reviews per week. ",
      "Green = resolved, red = open. Defaulting to last 3 months view."
    ))
  })

  # --- Agent Pass Rate panel (#146 Q10) ----------------------------------------
  # Cleveland dot chart: pass rate per agent, sorted ascending (lowest at bottom).
  # KPI table: agent | reviews | pass-rate | pass | fail | error | cost/review.
  # Source: roborev_agent_perf.json {agents:[{agent,n_runs,pass_rate,...}]}.
  safe_ap <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    agents <- raw$agents
    if (is.null(agents)) return(NULL)
    # load_json() uses fromJSON(simplifyDataFrame = TRUE), so a JSON array of
    # objects arrives as a data.frame, not a list-of-lists. lapply() over a
    # data.frame iterates its columns (atomic vectors), so r$agent would throw
    # "$ operator is invalid for atomic vectors". Accept either shape.
    df <- if (is.data.frame(agents)) {
      if (nrow(agents) == 0L) return(NULL)
      agents
    } else if (length(agents) > 0L) {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(agents, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          agent               = as.character(r$agent),
          n_runs              = as.integer(r$n_runs),
          pass_count          = as.integer(r$pass_count),
          fail_count          = as.integer(r$fail_count),
          error_count         = as.integer(r$error_count),
          pass_rate           = as.numeric(r$pass_rate),
          cost_per_review_usd = if (!is.null(r$cost_per_review_usd)) as.numeric(r$cost_per_review_usd) else NA_real_,
          stringsAsFactors    = FALSE
        )
      }))
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
    # Normalise column names/types from whichever shape arrived.
    pick_num <- function(col) if (col %in% names(df)) as.numeric(df[[col]]) else NA_real_
    pick_int <- function(col) if (col %in% names(df)) as.integer(df[[col]]) else NA_integer_
    cost <- if ("cost_per_review_usd" %in% names(df)) as.numeric(df[["cost_per_review_usd"]])
            else if ("cost_per_review" %in% names(df)) as.numeric(df[["cost_per_review"]])
            else NA_real_
    data.frame(
      agent           = as.character(df$agent),
      n_runs          = pick_int("n_runs"),
      pass_count      = pick_int("pass_count"),
      fail_count      = pick_int("fail_count"),
      error_count     = pick_int("error_count"),
      pass_rate       = pick_num("pass_rate"),
      cost_per_review = cost,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  output$rv_agent_perf_chart <- renderUI({
    ap <- safe_ap(roborev_agent_perf_raw)
    if (is.null(ap))
      return(ec_empty("No agent performance data yet â€” roborev_agent_perf.json not deployed", h = "250px"))
    # Sort ascending for Cleveland dot (lowest at bottom)
    ap <- ap[order(ap$pass_rate, decreasing = FALSE), ]
    n_agents   <- nrow(ap)
    total_runs <- sum(ap$n_runs)
    best_agent <- ap$agent[which.max(ap$pass_rate)]
    best_rate  <- round(max(ap$pass_rate) * 100, 1)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter  = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Pass rate: ' + (d.value * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 110, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "value",
        name = "Pass rate",
        nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 25,
        min = 0, max = 1,
        axisLabel = list(
          color = "#ccc",
          formatter = DT::JS("function(v){ return (v*100).toFixed(0)+'%'; }")
        ),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type = "category",
        data = I(ap$agent),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type       = "scatter",
        data       = I(ap$pass_rate),
        symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle  = list(color = "#4ea8de")   # primary blue (accessibility palette)
      ))
    ), h = "250px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Cleveland dot chart: roborev review agent pass rate. ",
      n_agents, " agents, ", total_runs, " total reviews. ",
      "Best performing agent: ", best_agent, " at ", best_rate, "% pass rate. ",
      "Data sourced from roborev_agent_performance table in unified.duckdb."
    ))
  })

  output$rv_agent_perf_table <- renderUI({
    ap <- safe_ap(roborev_agent_perf_raw)
    if (is.null(ap)) {
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "7", "No data yet"))))
    }
    # Sort descending by pass_rate for table (best first)
    ap <- ap[order(ap$pass_rate, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    fmt_cost <- function(x) {
      if (is.na(x)) "â€”" else sprintf("$%.4f", x)
    }
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(ap)), function(i) {
      r <- ap[i, , drop = FALSE]
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(r$agent),
        tags$td(formatC(r$n_runs,      format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(sprintf("%.1f%%", r$pass_rate * 100)),
        tags$td(formatC(r$pass_count,  format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$fail_count,  format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$error_count, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(fmt_cost(r$cost_per_review))
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # --- Review Backlog Age panel (#146 Q15) -------------------------------------
  # KPI text outputs from roborev_backlog_age.json top-level fields.
  safe_ba <- function(key, fmt = "%s", default = "â€”") {
    raw <- roborev_backlog_age_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(default)
    v <- raw[[key]]
    if (is.null(v) || (length(v) == 1 && is.na(v))) return(default)
    tryCatch(sprintf(fmt, v), error = function(e) default)
  }

  output$rv_ba_n_open <- renderText(safe_ba("n_open", "%d"))
  output$rv_ba_median <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ba("median_hours")
    if (v == "â€”") return("â€”")
    h <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(h)) return("â€”")
    if (h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", h) else sprintf("%.1f d", h / 24)
  })
  output$rv_ba_p90 <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ba("p90_hours")
    if (v == "â€”") return("â€”")
    h <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(h)) return("â€”")
    if (h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", h) else sprintf("%.1f d", h / 24)
  })
  output$rv_ba_max <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ba("max_hours")
    if (v == "â€”") return("â€”")
    h <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(h)) return("â€”")
    if (h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", h) else sprintf("%.1f d", h / 24)
  })

  # Horizontal bar chart (Cleveland-style) â€” one bar per age bucket.
  # x axis = count of open reviews; y axis = bucket label (oldest at top).
  # Buckets: 0-1d / 1-3d / 3-7d / 7-14d / >14d
  # Colour palette from accessibility rule (4.5:1 on dark bg): #4ea8de primary blue.
  output$rv_ba_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_backlog_age_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw))
      return(ec_empty("roborev_backlog_age.json not yet available", h = "260px"))
    buckets_raw <- raw$buckets
    if (is.null(buckets_raw) || length(buckets_raw) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No backlog age data available yet", h = "260px"))

    # Normalise: fromJSON(simplifyDataFrame=TRUE) returns a data.frame;
    # list-of-lists shape is also accepted.
    bdf <- if (is.data.frame(buckets_raw)) {
      buckets_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(buckets_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(label = as.character(r$label), n = as.integer(r$n),
                   stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      }))
    }
    if (!all(c("label", "n") %in% names(bdf)) || nrow(bdf) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Backlog age data malformed", h = "260px"))
    bdf$n <- as.integer(bdf$n)

    # Display oldest bucket at top (reverse order for horizontal bar)
    bdf <- bdf[rev(seq_len(nrow(bdf))), ]

    n_open   <- if (!is.null(raw$n_open))   as.integer(raw$n_open)   else sum(bdf$n)
    med_h    <- if (!is.null(raw$median_hours)) as.numeric(raw$median_hours) else NA_real_
    med_str  <- if (!is.na(med_h)) {
      if (med_h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", med_h) else sprintf("%.1f d", med_h / 24)
    } else "â€”"

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter  = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Open reviews: ' + d.value;",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 70, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Open reviews",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 28,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type      = "category",
        data      = I(bdf$label),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type      = "bar",
        data      = I(bdf$n),
        itemStyle = list(color = "#4ea8de"),    # primary blue â€” accessibility palette
        label     = list(
          show      = TRUE,
          position  = "right",
          color     = "#ccc",
          formatter = DT::JS("function(p){ return p.value > 0 ? p.value : ''; }")
        )
      ))
    ), h = "260px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Horizontal bar chart: open roborev review backlog age distribution. ",
      n_open, " total open reviews. ",
      "Median age: ", med_str, ". ",
      "Buckets from youngest (0-1d) at bottom to oldest (>14d) at top. ",
      "Source: roborev_backlog_age.json from reviews.db."
    ))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
